calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Henry Shain, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Jean Claude Lair, who was placed under oath and examined.
Claude Levy, Process Server for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Jonathan Theo Rodgers.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on June 25, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Jean Claude Lair, and against defendant Jonathan Theo Rodgers as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $290.00.
Holdover Damages - $346.71.
Costs - $190.00.
Total - $826.71.

Additionally, plaintiff Tenderloin Health is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1388 California Street, Room 303, San Francisco, CA 94109. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2009 Off Calendar
